chapter_title.en: Prayer of the Sick, the Unconcious, the Weak and the Infirm, the Elderly and Others

text: 1055 - وَ سَأَلَ لَيْثٌ اَلْمُرَادِيُّ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَرْعُفُ زَوَالَ اَلشَّمْسِ حَتَّى يَذْهَبَ اَللَّيْلُ قَالَ «يُومِئُ إِيمَاءً بِرَأْسِهِ عَنْ كُلِّ صَلاَةٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1055 - Layth al-Muradi asked Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about a man who suffers from continuous nosebleeds from the time of the sun's zenith until nightfall.
Imam (as) replied: "He should gesture with his head for each prayer."
